CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Oct-06-23 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Stephen Gorog, Esq. for Plaintiff.
Michael Dodson, Esq. for Defendant.

Mr. Dodson reported one deposition is set to be held on July 28, 2023, the need for another deposition, and mediation is scheduled for Aug. 28, 2023. 2023 at 11:30am. Mr. Gorog requested trial setting.

The court continues this matter to October 6, 2023 at 11:30am for trial setting conference via Zoom.

Judge: David B. Flinn ; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Apr-14-2023 Continued To Jul-21-23 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Stephen Gorog, Esq. for Plaintiff.
Michael Dodson, Esq. for Defendant.

Discussion held re: scheduling of subpoenas, deposition, settlement demand and mediation. The Court sets a further case management conference to be heard via Zoom on July, 21, 2023 at 11:30am.

Judge: David B. Flinn ; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Continued To Apr-14-23 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Attendance:
Attorney Stephen J. Gorog, Esq., Counsel for Plaintiff Lena Eile Babayev.
Attorney Michael J. Dodson, Esq., Counsel for Defendant Gabriella Nadine Hemann.

Discovery status hearing held. Parties to complete a few more third party depositions before undertaking medication. Parties agreed to further Case Management Conference to be held via ZOOM. JPT Flinn will host the CMC on April 14, 2023 at 11:30am.
Judge Pro Tem David B. Flinn, No Clerk and Not Reported. (D610)
